title: AFKTape
description: A simple mod that allows you to hold down keys while AFK.
body:
AFKTape

This mod was made to simulate taping down buttons while AFK. This can be very useful when using any farm that require holding buttons down,

or making tedious tasks like walking/boating long distances simple.



All you need to do is hold down any button or key and press 'K' (This can be changed in settings) to keep them held down.

Once held down, it will ungrab your cursor so you can do other things on your computer!



Held buttons will also pause when you open a gui, and then continue after, so it doesn't allow for anything that couldn't be done in vanilla, avoiding any 'cheating'.

!!Credits to [Kokeria](https://www.curseforge.com/members/kokeria/projects) since he made the [original mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/afktape) for versions upto 1.16.3 If he hadn't made it I would not be able to port it.
